'''zatushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zagotzerno|zagotzerno]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zagotzerno|zagotzerno]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zatushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zætishith|zætishith]] || [[word:zætishij|zætishij]] || [[word:zætishish|zætishish]] || [[word:zætishi|zætishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zatutushuth|zatutushuth]] || [[word:zatutushuj|zatutushuj]] || [[word:zatutushush|zatutushush]] || [[word:zatutushu|zatutushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zatushuth|zatushuth]] || [[word:zatushuj|zatushuj]] || [[word:zatushush|zatushush]] || [[word:zatushu|zatushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zatufshuth|zatufshuth]] || [[word:zatufshuj|zatufshuj]] || [[word:zatufshush|zatufshush]] || [[word:zatufshuf|zatufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zatushuthu|zatushuthu]] || [[word:zatushuju|zatushuju]] || [[word:zatushushu|zatushushu]] || [[word:zatushuku|zatushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zatushuth|zatushuth]] || [[word:zatushuj|zatushuj]] || [[word:zatushush|zatushush]] || [[word:zatushu|zatushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zatushuthul|zatushuthul]] || [[word:zatushujul|zatushujul]] || [[word:zatushushul|zatushushul]] || [[word:zatushukul|zatushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zatushuthuthu|zatushuthuthu]] || [[word:zatushujuju|zatushujuju]] || [[word:zatushushushu|zatushushushu]] || [[word:zatushuku|zatushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zatushuthun|zatushuthun]] || [[word:zatushujun|zatushujun]] || [[word:zatushushun|zatushushun]] || [[word:zatushukun|zatushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zatushuthuoro|zatushuthuoro]] || [[word:zatushujuoro|zatushujuoro]] || [[word:zatushushuoro|zatushushuoro]] || [[word:zatushukuoro|zatushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
